form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Gelding by Bivouac on debut. Runner-up in a Taupo trial over 900m on March 17. Cannot be underestimated.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Shane Crawford trained three-year-old gelding lining up for first race start. Won a recent Avondale trial. Worth consideration.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Shane Crawford trained three-year-old gelding lining up for first race start. Won a recent Avondale trial. Worth consideration.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign second last of 8 at Waverley October 19 over 1400m, soft track; 6 len behind Illustrious with 57.5kg at $12. On debut fifth of 7 at Waverley 3yo Mdn-Sw September 28 over 1400m, soft track; 3 len behind Our Grecia Girl with 57.5kg at $10.10. Likely to need this run.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third race start today. At debut, got back early 8th of 11 at Te Aroha on March 6 over 1150m, slow going 5.5 len behind Arwen carrying 56.5kg at $8.20. Second-up 9th of 11 at Matamata on March 22 over 1400m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Typhoon Lucy with 56.5kg at $17.80. Can do better.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 7th of 10 at Waverley on January 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Mazino with 56.5kg at $82.50. Last start second last of 10 at New Plymouth Raceway on March 7 over 1300m, slow going 14 len behind Fleur De Blues carrying 55.5kg at $36.20. Not among the chances.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Was well-supported at debut, 2nd in a small field at this track on March 14 over 1200m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind So We Go carrying 55.5kg at $2.50. Ready to break through with race experience under her belt.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Was well-supported at debut, 2nd in a small field at this track on March 14 over 1200m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind So We Go carrying 55.5kg at $2.50. Ready to break through with race experience under her belt.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Second-up. First-up after two months from last on the turn 5th of 9 at Matamata on March 11 over 1050m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind My Gabriel carrying 55.5kg at $6.50. Previously second-up made ground from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Tauherenikau on January 2 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.3 len behind Quello Dolce carrying 55kg at $4.40. Fitter and looks set to improve sharply.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: At the latest run 3rd in a small field at this track on March 14 over 1200m, slow going 4.5 len behind So We Go with 54.5kg at $5.70. The run before that 7th of 14 at Waverley on January 28 over 1400m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Tomahawk carrying 55.5kg at $18. Can improve again. Best efforts give her a live chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Restrained at the start to obtain cover from the outside barrier.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Filly back from a spell of nine months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 8 at Hawera July 15 over 1200m, in the wet; 19 len behind Spandeedo with 54kg at $23.60. First up last campaign fourth of 10 at this track May 31 over 1200m, on heavy track; 2.5 len behind Platinum Diamond carrying 54kg at $14.50. Looks all set for a bright return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Dual acceptor. Filly back from a spell of nine months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 8 at Hawera July 15 over 1200m, in the wet; 19 len behind Spandeedo with 54kg at $23.60. First up last campaign fourth of 10 at this track May 31 over 1200m, on heavy track; 2.5 len behind Platinum Diamond carrying 54kg at $14.50. Looks all set for a bright return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, losing ground. Went off stride near the 1000m.
Lay outwards over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 6th of 9 at Tauherenikau on January 2 over 1000m, slow going 4.5 len behind Quello Dolce with 54kg at $5.90. Returned from break 4th of 12 at Waverley on March 18 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Sant Maurici carrying 53kg at $13.90. Should hold the form and she appeals as one of the hardest to beat.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Second-up. First-up after four months second last of 8 at Te Aroha on March 28 over 1150m, on a wet track; 6 len behind Wine Rocs carrying 53kg at $22.80. Previously second-up 8th of 10 at New Plymouth Raceway on November 21 over 1200m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Laura's Legacy carrying 55.5kg at $11.70. Fitter but looks a forlorn hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up rounding the final bend and early in the straight.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Was at long odds at debut, failed to make an impression; 7th of 9 at Tauherenikau on February 6 over 1300m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Midnight Train carrying 56kg at $38.70. Requires significant improvement.
